The fact that 체크계좌 없음 is associated with lower estimated risk, because it empirically reduces the estimated probability of default, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that 마이너스 잔액 is associated with higher estimated risk, because it exhibits a substantially higher estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that 대출 기간 is associated with longer repayment terms, because longer durations increase the likelihood of credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
